---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Interactive security tools, assessments, and utilities from chen.ist. Free to use."
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Resources</div>
    <h1>Interactive Tools</h1>
    <p>Security assessments, calculators, and utilities. Free to use.</p>
    <a href="#tools" class="ev-btn">Browse tools</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- AVAILABLE TOOLS -->
<div class="m-s" id="tools" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Security Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Evaluate and improve your security posture.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="nis2-assessment.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="NIS2 Assessment"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-lightning me-1"></i>Interactive</div><h3>NIS2 Self-Assessment</h3><p>Find out if NIS2 applies to you and assess your compliance readiness in 5 minutes.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="password-strength-checker.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Password Checker"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-lightning me-1"></i>Interactive</div><h3>Password Strength Checker</h3><p>Evaluate password strength with entropy calculation and estimated cracking time.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="zero-trust-assessment.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Zero Trust"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-lightning me-1"></i>Interactive</div><h3>Zero Trust Assessment</h3><p>Evaluate your organization's Zero Trust maturity with domain-specific scoring.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- COMING SOON -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Coming soon</h2>
    <p class="sub">More tools in development.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card" style="opacity:0.5;"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="SSL"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>SSL/TLS Inspector</h3><p>Analyze certificates for security issues.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card" style="opacity:0.5;"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Cloud Cost"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cloud Cost Calculator</h3><p>Estimate and compare cloud provider costs.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card" style="opacity:0.5;"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Headers"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Security Headers Analyzer</h3><p>Check HTTP security headers.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card" style="opacity:0.5;"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="CIDR"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>CIDR Subnet Calculator</h3><p>IP ranges and subnet masks.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card" style="opacity:0.5;"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Breach"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Data Breach Cost Estimator</h3><p>Estimate financial impact of a breach.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card" style="opacity:0.5;"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="CLI"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>CloudScan CLI</h3><p>Scan cloud environments for misconfigurations.</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a custom tool?</h2>
    <p>We build bespoke security and infrastructure tools for organizations.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Talk to our team</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Open-source first &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Enterprise ready &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Custom integrations
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
